- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project type clarified: Next.js web app, TypeScript, App Router, Tailwind, architecture ready for future mobile clients.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Next.js scaffold created manually in the current folder because the workspace name contains uppercase characters rejected by npm package naming.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented the key v1 surfaces: home, trips search, trip publishing, messaging UI, ratings UI, and admin moderation dashboard.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No extensions needed from the project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed. `npm run lint` and `npm run build` pass successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Created and launched a VS Code task for `npm run dev`. The app is running on port 3001 in this workspace.

- [x] Launch the Project
	Debug confirmation received. A browser debug configuration was added for the running app on port 3001.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and this file were updated with the current project information, and HTML comments were removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
